id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks.

setProps.description:
Dash-assigned callback that should be called to report property changes
to Dash, to make them available for callbacks.

positions.description: The positions of the nodes for each member of the graph

ccs.description: Connected components of the graph for each member

radii.description: The radii of the nodes (one per node, do not capture uncertainty in the radii)

edges.description:
Edges between the nodes including the probability
Structure: [[source, target, probability], ...]

orderByColorSimilarity.description:
Define the ordering of the pie charts:
if true, order by color similarity
otherwise use the member order

useSizeForProbabilities.description:
Define if a node that is only partially part of a connected component 
should encode the probability of being part of that component by the size,
otherwise use gray for showing parts that do not belong

colormap.description: A string for the name of the colormap

saveOnClick.description:
A boolean value to indicate whether clicking should open
a file diaglog to save the graph as an image

clickData.description:
A string representing data from the last click event for logging purposes.
This is not used for rendering but can be used to log click events.

userDefinedCCColors.description:
A list of colors for specific user-defined connected components.
If not provided, default colors will be used based on the average position.
